name: hopper_bf16_gemm
title: Hopper BF16 GEMM Arena
description: Hopper H100 BF16 GEMM matrix grouped by launch-sensitive control, sustained square throughput, and transformer-style projection workloads. Shapes are tensor-core-friendly and intended for native-only arena comparisons.

shapes.name: control-square-512
shapes.note: Launch-sensitive control shape. Keeps a small tensor-core GEMM in the mix to expose orchestration tax instead of hiding it behind giant problem sizes.

shapes.name: square-1024
shapes.note: Medium square GEMM for the transition out of launch-bound behavior.

shapes.name: square-2048
shapes.note: Sustained square throughput checkpoint with enough work to amortize setup.

shapes.name: square-4096
shapes.note: Primary Hopper control square. This is the cleanest throughput read for vendor and custom tensor-core lanes.

shapes.name: prefill-proj-8192x4096x4096
shapes.note: Large prefill-style projection with high M footprint to stress scheduling and sustained feed.

shapes.name: ff-up-4096x4096x16384
shapes.note: Transformer MLP expansion GEMM. Wide-N shape catches kernels that only look good on neat square problems.

shapes.name: ff-down-4096x16384x4096
shapes.note: Transformer MLP contraction GEMM. Wide-K shape exposes pipeline and memory-feed weaknesses differently from ff-up.
